name: Form.Field

unions.name: FieldMsg
unions.comment: These messages can be used by the form system

aliases.name: Field
aliases.type: { view : fieldCtx -> Form.Field.ViewConfig value state hint -> view, state : Form.Field.Value value state, update : fieldCtx -> msg -> Form.Field.Value value state -> Form.Field.Value value state, hints : List.List hint, label : Maybe.Maybe String.String, placeholder : Maybe.Maybe String.String, description : Maybe.Maybe String.String, getContext : ctx -> fieldCtx, hinting : List.List (Form.Field.Hint hint value), globalHinting : List.List (Form.Field.GlobalHint ctx hint form) }

aliases.name: Parser
aliases.comment: Parse a field to another value.

aliases.name: Value
aliases.comment: Every field state needs to have a value

aliases.name: ViewConfig
aliases.comment: The record given to a field view function
aliases.type: { state : Form.Field.Value value state, hints : List.List hint, label : Maybe.Maybe String.String, placeholder : Maybe.Maybe String.String, description : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

values.name: isDefined
values.comment: Fails if the Maybe does not contain a value
values.type: hint -> Maybe.Maybe a -> Result.Result hint ()

values.name: isEmail
values.comment: Will use a regex to check if a string is in an email shape
values.type: hint -> String.String -> Result.Result hint ()

values.name: isTrue
values.comment: Fails if false
values.type: hint -> Basics.Bool -> Result.Result hint ()

values.name: notEmpty
values.comment: Fails in case the string is empty or whitespace only
values.type: hint -> String.String -> Result.Result hint ()

values.name: withDescription
values.comment: Add a short description under a field
values.type: String.String -> Form.Field.Field form value state msg error ctx fieldCtx view -> Form.Field.Field form value state msg error ctx fieldCtx view

values.name: withGlobalHints
values.comment: Add a global hint
values.type: List.List (Form.Field.GlobalHint ctx hint form) -> Form.Field.Field form value state msg hint ctx fieldCtx view -> Form.Field.Field form value state msg hint ctx fieldCtx view

values.name: withHints
values.comment: Add hints to a field. When the field is updated all the hints will be tested and displayed if they don't pass.
values.type: List.List (Form.Field.Hint hint value) -> Form.Field.Field form value state msg hint ctx fieldCtx view -> Form.Field.Field form value state msg hint ctx fieldCtx view

values.name: withLabel
values.comment: Add a label to your field. The field is put inside a label tag.
values.type: String.String -> Form.Field.Field form value state msg error ctx fieldCtx view -> Form.Field.Field form value state msg error ctx fieldCtx view

values.name: withPlaceholder
values.comment: Add a placeholder value to a field.
values.type: String.String -> Form.Field.Field form value state msg error ctx fieldCtx view -> Form.Field.Field form value state msg error ctx fieldCtx view

name: Form.Html

values.name: append
values.comment: Append another field in your form pipeline!
values.type: Form.Field.Field valid a state msg error context localCtx (Html.Html (Form.Field.FieldMsg msg)) -> Form.Html.FormT (a -> value) valid (a -> value) context -> Form.Html.FormT value valid value context

values.name: appendParsed
values.comment:
Append another field in your form pipeline.

This time adding a parser step.
values.type: Form.Field.Parser valid b error -> Form.Field.Field valid a state msg error context localCtx (Html.Html (Form.Field.FieldMsg msg)) -> Form.Html.FormT (a -> value) valid (b -> validated) context -> Form.Html.FormT value valid validated context

values.name: get
values.comment: Get the current input value
values.type: Form.Html.Form value validated context -> value

values.name: hardcoded
values.comment: Append a hardcoded value in your form pipeline!
values.type: a -> Form.Html.FormT (a -> value) valid (a -> value) context -> Form.Html.FormT value valid value context

values.name: hardcodedParsed
values.comment:
Append a hardcoded value in your form pipeline!

This time adding a parser step.
values.type: Form.Field.Parser valid b error -> a -> Form.Html.FormT (a -> value) valid (b -> validated) context -> Form.Html.FormT value valid validated context

values.name: isValid
values.comment: Check if all fields pass all hints and parse to their resulting type.
values.type: context -> Form.Html.Form value validated context -> Result.Result (Form.Html.Form value validated context) validated

values.name: succeed
values.comment: Start of the pipeline
values.type: value -> validated -> Form.Html.FormT value valid validated context

values.name: view
values.comment:
Render a form that requires a context

This returns a list of Html. Each item in the list corresponds to a field in the form.

    div []
        (view () form)
values.type: context -> Form.Html.Form value validated context -> List.List (Html.Html (Form.Html.Form value validated context))

values.name: viewSimple
values.comment:
View function for the form

This returns a list of Html. Each item in the list corresponds to a field in the form.

    div []
        (view form)
values.type: Form.Html.SimpleForm value -> List.List (Html.Html (Form.Html.SimpleForm value))

name: Form.Internals

values.name: formView
values.comment: Called every draw
values.type: Form.Field.Field valid a state msg error ctx localCtx html8 -> { formRecord | view : ctx -> valid -> List.List html6 } -> ((Form.Field.FieldMsg msg -> continue) -> html8 -> html5) -> ((form -> continue) -> html6 -> html5) -> ({ formRecord | view : ctx -> valid -> List.List html6 } -> form) -> (Form.Field.Field valid a state msg error ctx localCtx html8 -> form -> continue) -> ctx -> valid -> List.List html5

values.name: hardcodedField
values.comment: hardcoded field
values.type: Result.Result hint fieldval -> { form | validated : ctx -> val -> Result.Result form2 (fieldval -> validated) } -> ({ form | validated : ctx -> val -> Result.Result form2 (fieldval -> validated) } -> form2) -> (form2 -> continue) -> ctx -> val -> Result.Result continue validated

values.name: hardcodedView
values.comment: Called every view
values.type: { formRecord | view : ctx -> valid -> List.List html6 } -> ((form -> continue) -> html6 -> html5) -> (form -> continue) -> ctx -> valid -> List.List html5

values.name: updateField
values.comment: Called every updated
values.type: ctx -> valid -> Result.Result error b -> Form.Field.FieldMsg msg -> formRecord -> (formRecord -> form) -> Form.Field.Field valid a state msg error ctx localCtx html -> (Form.Field.Field valid a state msg error ctx localCtx html -> form -> continue) -> continue

values.name: validateField
values.comment: Validate field
values.type: Result.Result hint fieldval -> { form | validated : ctx -> val -> Result.Result form2 (fieldval -> validated) } -> ({ form | validated : ctx -> val -> Result.Result form2 (fieldval -> validated) } -> form2) -> Form.Field.Field val value state msg hint ctx lctx html -> (Form.Field.Field val value state msg hint ctx lctx html -> form2 -> continue) -> ctx -> val -> Result.Result continue validated

name: Form.SimpleFields

unions.name: TextType
unions.comment: What type of input for textfields

aliases.name: RangeFieldConfig
aliases.type: { min : Basics.Float, max : Basics.Float, step : Basics.Float }

aliases.name: SelectFieldConfig
aliases.type: { display : a -> String.String, key : a -> String.String }

values.name: checkBox
values.comment:
Checkbox field
Simple checkbox to get a boolean
values.type: Basics.Bool -> Form.SimpleFields.CheckField form ctx

values.name: colorField
values.comment: Color field
values.type: Color.Color -> Form.SimpleFields.ColorField form ctx

values.name: dateField
values.comment: Browser Datefield
values.type: Maybe.Maybe Date.Date -> Form.SimpleFields.DateField form ctx

values.name: fileField
values.comment: File field
values.type: Form.SimpleFields.FileFieldConfig -> Maybe.Maybe File.File -> Form.SimpleFields.FileField form ctx

values.name: rangeField
values.comment: Range slider
values.type: Form.SimpleFields.RangeFieldConfig -> Basics.Float -> Form.SimpleFields.RangeField form ctx

values.name: selectContextualField
values.comment:
Dropdown selection field
This field uses a context to get a list of possible selection item from outside the form.
values.type: (ctx -> List.List a) -> Form.SimpleFields.SelectFieldConfig a -> a -> Form.SimpleFields.SelectField form ctx (List.List a) a

values.name: selectField
values.comment:
Dropdown selection field
This field will always have a value selected.
values.type: List.List a -> Form.SimpleFields.SelectFieldConfig a -> a -> Form.SimpleFields.SelectField form ctx ctx a

values.name: selectMaybeField
values.comment:
Dropdown selection field
This resolves into a maybe type, so it's possible to select "Nothing"
values.type: List.List a -> Form.SimpleFields.SelectFieldConfig a -> Maybe.Maybe a -> Form.SimpleFields.SelectField form ctx ctx (Maybe.Maybe a)

values.name: textField
values.comment: Regular textfield!
values.type: Form.SimpleFields.TextFieldConfig -> String.String -> Form.SimpleFields.TextField form ctx
